headline: Vanguard Wellington Is a 97-Year-Old Underdog. It’s Still Going Strong.
summary: Investors are moving on from its classic style.  The fund, founded in 1929, epitomizes Vanguard Group founder Jack Bogle’s values—own a balanced mix of stocks and bonds, and keep your costs down.  While that may be unfashionable in today’s world of prediction markets, cryptocurrencies, and highflying artificial-intelligence bets, Vanguard Wellington has long proven its mettle and is likely to keep doing so.

content.title: Vanguard Wellington Is a 97-Year-Old Underdog. It’s Still Going Strong.
content.summary: Investors are moving on from its classic style.  The fund, founded in 1929, epitomizes Vanguard Group founder Jack Bogle’s values—own a balanced mix of stocks and bonds, and keep your costs down.  While that may be unfashionable in today’s world of prediction markets, cryptocurrencies, and highflying artificial-intelligence bets, Vanguard Wellington has long proven its mettle and is likely to keep doing so.

headline: SpaceX Is Worth $2 Trillion? What That Might Mean.
summary: SpaceX is worth how much?  Bloomberg reported Thursday that SpaceX was seeking an initial public offering valuation of about $2 trillion, up from earlier estimates of $1.8 trillion.  SpaceX was valued at $1.25 trillion after its merger in February with xAI.

content.title: SpaceX Is Worth $2 Trillion? What That Might Mean.
content.summary: SpaceX is worth how much?  Bloomberg reported Thursday that SpaceX was seeking an initial public offering valuation of about $2 trillion, up from earlier estimates of $1.8 trillion.  SpaceX was valued at $1.25 trillion after its merger in February with xAI.

headline: Big Tech H-1B Filings Plunge As Amazon, Google, Meta And Microsoft Slash Jobs Amid Rising Immigration Costs
summary: H-1B visa applications at major tech companies fell sharply in late 2025 as layoffs rose and stricter U.S. immigration rules increased costs and scrutiny. Big Tech H-1B Applications Drop Federal data shows Amazon.com Inc.), Alphabet Inc.'s Google, Meta Platforms, Inc., and Microsoft Corp filed significantly fewer H-1B petitions in the first quarter of fiscal 2026, as reported by Business Insider on Wednesday. headline: Cloud AI Update - Hidden Costs Surge In Global Enterprise AI Operations
summary: Dan Herbatschek, CEO of Ramsey Theory Group, emphasizes a significant surge in enterprise AI operational costs, which are being underestimated by organizations globally by 30% or more. The costs associated with scaling AI infrastructure are highlighted as a hidden crisis, with enterprises often basing their budgets on pilot projects rather than the extensive demands of full production. Key challenges include the shift from initial model development costs to the ongoing expenses of running AI...

content.title: Cloud AI Update - Hidden Costs Surge In Global Enterprise AI Operations

Key challenges include the shift from initial model development costs to the ongoing expenses of running AI...

headline: Alphabet vs. Tesla: This stock is just an 'immense cash flow machine'
summary: Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" tournament has whittled down the competition of top-performing companies, pairing Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL) against Tesla (TSLA) and Palantir Technologies (PLTR) against Walmart (WMT) in today's matchups.Carnegie Investment Counsel director of research Greg Halter decides who will move on to the Final Four in this clash of the corporations, detailing his reasoning and analysis behind each company's stock and growth drivers.

content.title: Alphabet vs. Tesla: This stock is just an 'immense cash flow machine'
content.description:
Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" tournament has whittled down the competition of top-performing companies, pairing Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL) against Tesla (TSLA) and Palantir Technologies (PLTR) against Walmart (WMT) in today's matchups.

Carnegie Investment Counsel director of research Greg Halter decides who will move on to the Final Four in this clash of the corporations, detailing his reasoning and analysis behind each company's stock and growth drivers.

headline: Turkey launches investigation into Google over advertising, billing practices
summary: The Turkish ‌Competition Board said ‌on Friday it had ​decided to launch an investigation into Alphabet Inc ‌and related ⁠Google companies over its advertising ⁠and billing practices.  The investigation aims ​to ​determine ​whether Google's ‌billing practices and commercial practices related to its online advertising services to ‌advertisers and ​advertising agency ​clients ​violate Turkish ‌law, the board ​said ​in a statement.

content.title: Turkey launches investigation into Google over advertising, billing practices
content.summary: The Turkish ‌Competition Board said ‌on Friday it had ​decided to launch an investigation into Alphabet Inc ‌and related ⁠Google companies over its advertising ⁠and billing practices.  The investigation aims ​to ​determine ​whether Google's ‌billing practices and commercial practices related to its online advertising services to ‌advertisers and ​advertising agency ​clients ​violate Turkish ‌law, the board ​said ​in a statement.

headline: Fidelity’s Active Large-Cap Growth ETF FFLG Is Winning the Battle but Losing the War
